lines.text: Tell me whatcha say now / Tell me whatcha say? / Come again?
If you cannot stay down / Then you do not have to pretend / Like there is no way out / I shoulda never let you in / 'Cause you got me face down
And don't take this personal / But you're the worst / You know what you've done to me / And although it hurts, I know I just can't keep runnin' away
I don't need you, I don't need you / I don't need you, I don't need you / But I want you / I don't mean to, I don't mean to / I don't mean to, I don't mean to / But I love you

You said that you would come again / You said that we would remain friends but / You know that I do not depend on / Nothing or no one / So why would you show up? / So uninvited then / Just change my mind like that
Please don't take this personal / But you ain't shit / And you weren't special / 'Til I made you so / You better act like you know / That I've been through worse than you
Everybody's like "He's no item" / "Please don't like him" / "He don't wife 'em" / "He one nights 'em" / I never listen, no / I should have figured though
But it was you, so I was with it / Then tell you the truth, wish we never did it / 'Cause I usually do stick to the business / But you came out the blue and then you just flipped it
Funny how everything changed / Once you got all that you wanted / Nothing was ever the same
